hymns.name: To Protogonos
hymns.greek: Πρωτόγονον καλέω, Φάνητα, μέγαν θεὸν εὐρυμέδοντα
hymns.transliteration: Prōtogonon kaleō, Phanēta, megan theon eurymedonta
hymns.translation_en: I call upon Protogonos, Phanes, great god of wide dominion

hymns.name: To Night
hymns.greek: Νύκτα σεμνὴν καλέω, μήτηρ θεῶν τε καὶ ἀνδρῶν
hymns.transliteration: Nyxta semnēn kaleō, mētēr theōn te kai andrōn
hymns.translation_en: I call upon holy Night, mother of gods and men

hymns.name: To Zeus
hymns.translation_en: Zeus most honored, Zeus glorious among men, greatest

hymns.name: To Dionysus
hymns.translation_en: I call upon Dionysus, Bromios, Euhan, the Loosener

hymns.name: To Earth
hymns.greek: Γαῖα, θεῶν μήτηρ, πάντων ἕδος ἀκάματον
hymns.transliteration: Gaia, theōn mētēr, pantōn hedos akamaton
hymns.translation_en: Earth, mother of gods, unwearied seat of all

hymns.name: To Memory
hymns.greek: Μνημοσύνην καλέω, ἣ πάντων μήτηρ ἐγένετο
hymns.transliteration: Mēmosynēn kaleō, hē pantōn mētēr egeneto
hymns.translation_en: I call upon Memory, who became mother of all

tablets.name: Thurioi Tablet A1
tablets.translation_en: Say to Persephone: I send you a bull

tablets.name: Thurioi Tablet A2
tablets.greek: Παῖς εἰμι Γῆς καὶ Οὐρανοῦ ἀστερόεντος
tablets.transliteration: Pais eimi Gēs kai Ouranou asteróentos
tablets.translation_en: I am a child of Earth and starry Heaven

tablets.name: Petelia Tablet
tablets.greek: Εὑρήσεις δ᾽ ἐν Ἅιδου δόμοις ἐπ᾽ ἀριστερὰ κρήνην
tablets.transliteration: Heurēseis d' en Haidou domois ep' aristera krēnēn
tablets.translation_en: You will find in Hades' halls, on the left, a spring

tablets.name: Hipponion Tablet
tablets.greek: Τῇδε ὁδός ἐστιν, ἵνα τε καὶ ἄλλοι μύσται καὶ βάκχοι στείχουσι
tablets.transliteration: Tēde hodos estin, hina te kai alloi mystai kai bakchoi steichousi
tablets.translation_en: This is the way where other mystics and bacchants walk
